channel.title: Comments on: Releasing bb Mystique v1.0 – Mystique Theme for bbPress!

item.title: By: Eric DuRose
item.dc:creator: Eric DuRose
item.description:
Thank you Gautam. That is what I thought.
I love your blog .... keep up the awesome work.
item.content:encoded:
Thank you Gautam. That is what I thought.

I love your blog …. keep up the awesome work.

item.title: By: Gautam
item.dc:creator: Gautam
item.description:
In reply to <a href="/releasing-bb-mystique-for-bbpress/#comment-19106">Eric DuRose</a>.
This theme was built for bbPress 1.0-1.1 standalone only. If you're running Mystique on your blog, bbPress 2.1.x would automatically try to merge into the theme of your blog. :)
item.content:encoded:
In reply to Eric DuRose.

This theme was built for bbPress 1.0-1.1 standalone only. If you’re running Mystique on your blog, bbPress 2.1.x would automatically try to merge into the theme of your blog. 🙂

item.title: By: Eric DuRose
item.dc:creator: Eric DuRose
item.description:
Hi Gautam,
Is this theme compatible with bbPress v. 2.1.2?
I've loaded it (/plugins/bbpress/bbp-themes/) but it's not coming up in the list of themes in the admin and then I noticed this post and the download is dated in 2010.
Thanks,
Eric
item.content:encoded:
Hi Gautam,

Is this theme compatible with bbPress v. 2.1.2?

I’ve loaded it (/plugins/bbpress/bbp-themes/) but it’s not coming up in the list of themes in the admin and then I noticed this post and the download is dated in 2010.

Thanks,

Eric

item.title: By: Mathieu
item.dc:creator: Mathieu
item.description:
In reply to <a href="/releasing-bb-mystique-for-bbpress/#comment-2065">Gautam</a>.
Yes thanks :) I fix it. (chmod 755) Can I translate this theme in french with the .po of the wordpress theme ?
item.content:encoded:
In reply to Gautam.

Yes thanks 🙂 I fix it. (chmod 755)
Can I translate this theme in french with the .po of the wordpress theme ?

item.title: By: Gautam
item.dc:creator: Gautam
item.description: Looks fine to me.. is your problem fixed now?
item.content:encoded: Looks fine to me.. is your problem fixed now?

item.title: By: bharath vn
item.dc:creator: bharath vn
item.description: Thanks, theme is good but displaying ads are limited to certain area.
item.content:encoded: Thanks, theme is good but displaying ads are limited to certain area.

item.title: By: Madav
item.dc:creator: Madav
item.description:
In reply to <a href="/releasing-bb-mystique-for-bbpress/#comment-1814">rishabh</a>.
One of the wonderful theme. Definitely going to give a try.
item.content:encoded:
In reply to rishabh.

One of the wonderful theme. Definitely going to give a try.
